c-0: ^[Marcus]: I can't move my body, something is wrong with me. I can't feel my body!
^[Marcus]: Guys please help me. I'm not joking. Call 911...

resThree: ^Alright. David help me pick him up, we need to find a place with reception.

c-0: ^[David]: Do you realize how far out we are? It would be smarter for me to stay with him while you run down the road and find help...

resFour: ^Okay. You guys stay here, I'm going to go find us some help.

c-0: ^[David]: We will stay here. But hurry up because it is getting dark soon. If you can't find anyone before 5 PM, run back here and we will carry him out. I have my flashlight with me.
c-1: ^[David]: Are you stupid? We're not going to drag him down the mountain. Go find the park rangers and tell them which trail we are on. I have my flashlight.

resFive: ^Alright fine. But stay with Marcus and don't go anywhere. I will be back.

c-0: ^[David]: We will stay here. But hurry up because it is getting dark soon. If you can't find anyone before 5 PM, run back here and we will carry him out. I have my flashlight with me.
